subcodes.title: Words to a Jewish lady, spoken on 1912-10-26
subcodes.first_line: It is obvious that you have a pure character, so I want you to become aware of the truth of divine matters. At the time of each Manifestation of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: معلوم است فطرت تو پاک است لذا من میخواهم بحقیقت مسائل الهیه آگاه شوی در زمان هر یک از مظاهر مقدسه الهیه
subcodes.subjects: @independent investigation of truth; reality, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @study; deepening, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
